title: Tactical COP (Grok-refined): battlespace-manager operator picture
description:
Refined from Grok review: https://grok.com/share/c2hhcmQtMg_28836953-c53c-4879-865f-ef40890a1a41

Adapted to existing stack (not greenfield Vue):
- battlespace-display + entity-display (Svelte 5, Vite)
- Leaflet map with manual marker Map updates (Grok shallowRef pattern)
- FastAPI /api/picture + SSE /api/stream (GulfWarEngine; o-my Redis for entity-display)
- F2T2EA workflow rails already present

Grok priorities retained: sub-second updates, MIL-STD-2525D symbology (milsymbol), offline picture cache, RBAC gating, tactical HUD, TDD increments.

Deferred: full MapLibre migration, offline vector tiles (PMTiles), greenfield Pinia/Dexie app.

title: 0.3 Picture schema contract test (/api/picture)

close_reason: Phase 0 complete: ADR, Track+Zod, picture contract, run-display-tests.sh

close_reason: Phase 0 complete: ADR, Track+Zod, picture contract, run-display-tests.sh
